items.subtitle: Milon Private Fitness
items.description: High-touch, personalized training with Architects. Focus: strength, body composition, performance, accountability.

items.subtitle: Milon Pilates
items.description: Precision movement, control, alignment, core integrity. Focus: posture, mobility, stability, intelligent conditioning.

items.subtitle: Milon Wellness & Recovery
items.description: Regeneration and long-term resilience. Focus: recovery protocols, restoration, nervous system reset, injury prevention.

items.subtitle: Cafe
items.description: Daily ritual, communal, and nourishment. Focus: clean fuel, conversation, lifestyle consistency.

items.question: Is this a traditional gym?
items.answer: No. House of Milon operates on a focused, architectural approach to strength and recovery. We provide a distraction-free environment dedicated exclusively to progressive overload and deliberate restoration, rather than generalized fitness.

items.question: Do I need to be an advanced athlete to join?
items.answer: Not at all. Our philosophy of incremental gains applies to every starting point. Our Architects design programs customized to your current physiology, focusing on building a solid foundation first before advancing.

items.question: What is included in the membership?
items.answer: Membership grants access to The Forge (private fitness floor), The Restoration Floor (sauna suites, cold plunge, compression therapy), and priority booking for The Studio (Pilates) and individual Architect sessions.

items.question: Can I tour the facility before committing?
items.answer: Yes. We require all prospective members to book a Private Tour. This ensures that our environment aligns with your training goals and maintains the focused atmosphere of the House.

items.question: This is Damon, Can I add my own questions?
items.answer: Most Certainly. The CMS integration is ahead of schedule.
